meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes; Subcommittee on the taxonomy of the suborder Pseudonocardineae: Minutes of the meeting, 26 July 2005, San Francisco, CA, USA
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 4. Minutes of the previous meeting.
The minutes of the subcommittee of 2002 (Paris) were published in 2004 by Goodfellow & Trujillo [Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 54 (2004), 283].

Minute 5. New taxa and reclassifications.
The following names have been validly published since the last meeting of the subcommittee:

Prauserella halophila sp. nov. [Li et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 53 (2003), 15451549].

Prauserella alba sp. nov. [Li et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 53 (2003), 15451549].

Pseudonocardia chloroethenivorans sp. nov. [Lee et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 54 (2004), 131139].

Amycolatopsis lurida sp. nov., comb. nov. [Stackebrandt et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 54 (2004), 257268].

Amycolatopsis palatopharyngis sp. nov. [Huang et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 54 (2004), 359363].

Pseudonocardia dioxanivorans sp. nov. [Mahendra et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 55 (2005), 593598].

Amycolatopsis plumensis sp. nov. [Saintpierre-Bonaccio et al., Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 55 (2005), 20572061].

Minute 6. Taxonomic comments.
The question was raised in this subcommittee as to whether the threshold of 97 % 16S rRNA gene sequence similarity should be raised for species descriptions. D. P. Labeda commented that it would be a good idea to check all new sequences and DNADNA hybridization data available before suggesting a new value which may be proposed in the next meeting.

Minute 7. Minimal standards update.
It was agreed that a draft document on minimal standards will be prepared in the near future for the description of novel members of the suborder Pseudonocardineae.

Minute 8. Current membership.
The current membership of the subcommittee is as follows: J. Chun (Korea), R. M. Kroppenstedt (Germany), T. Kudo (Japan), D. P. Labeda (USA), Z. Liu (China), T. Tamura (Japan), M. Goodfellow (UK) (Chairman) and M. E. Trujillo (Spain) (Secretary). It was agreed that all members will be contacted via email to enquire about their desire to continue as members of this subcommittee. Additionally, invitation letters will be forwarded to other colleagues who may be interested in joining.

Minute 9. Next meeting.
The next meeting of the subcommittee will be held in Madrid in 2006 at the Second FEMS Congress.

Minute 10. Adjournment.
The meeting was adjourned at 15 : 00 on 26 July 2005.
